title: Get Char Code
description: Write a Vera function that returns the ASCII character code at a given index in a string. Use the string_char_code built-in function. The first parameter is the string, the second is the index.
description_neutral: Return the ASCII character code at a given index in a string.
notes: Tests discovery of string_char_code. Contracts are trivial (ensures(true)) so Z3-verifiable at Tier 1. String operations are in the body only, not in contracts.
